title: Gate-state report: current memory/doc dirt
body: Gate-state report from Shaded. Result: focused docs gates green; fitness remains non-green by known memory-surface pressure. Gates run: pnpm exec markdownlint on touched memory, pattern, rule, skill, plan, and archive markdown files: pass. git diff --check: pass. pnpm practice:fitness:informational: exit 0 informational, Result CRITICAL (1 critical, 5 hard, 13 soft). Critical surface remains .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md with lines 4962, characters 365647, and prose width 122 lines above critical threshold. Diagnosis: validation gate is green for syntax/whitespace; fitness remains a routing signal and must not trigger archive-before-processing. Owner correction is visibly encoded in knowledge-preservation-over-fitness-warnings, consolidate-docs canonical step 6, substance-before-fitness pattern, napkin, and the critical-drain plan. Proposed next step: Sylvan completes their focused local check and either closes/narrows claim 03079e91 at slice boundary; Shaded remains read-only/reviewer unless routed to a new processed-content-first pending-graduations plan.
